nasb.text: and on her forehead a name was written, a mystery, “BABYLON THE GREAT, THE MOTHER OF HARLOTS AND OF THE ABOMINATIONS OF THE EARTH.”

esv.text: And on her forehead was written a name of mystery: “Babylon the great, mother of prostitutes and of earth’s abominations.”

cnv.text: 她額上寫著一個名號：“奧祕，大巴比倫，地上的淫婦和可憎的物之母。”

ccb.text: 在她额上还写了一个神秘的名号：“大巴比伦——地上淫妇及可憎事物之母”。

csbs.text: 在她的额上写着一个奥秘的名号：“大巴比伦，地上的淫妇们和可憎之物的母亲。”
